name: The Loudest Player Summons It
text:
At the beginning of each upkeep, the loudest player since your last turn puts a sludge counter on a creature you control. If the table genuinely cannot agree who was loudest, they argue about it, get louder, and you put two counters instead.
Whenever a creature you control would deal combat damage, it deals that much to the loudest opponent in addition. Volume is a resource now. It is your resource.
flavorText: It is drawn to noise. The town meeting about the noise was, fatally, very noisy.
